name: PT Kresna Graha Investama Tbk
summary: PT Kresna Graha Investama Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates in financial and investment, and technology and digital sectors in Indonesia. The company's Financial and Investment segment offers mutual funds and fixed income; and financial advisory, asset management, brokerage, investment management, and securities underwriting services, as well as operates stock trading platform. Its Technology and Digital segment provides integrated digital products and services comprising financial technology, digital retail and marketing, artificial intelligence, and enterprise solutions, as well as media, and entertainment and lifestyle. The company also engages in the development of human resources platform; trading, online media, and outsourcing activities; digital cloud advertising business; sale of electric vouchers; and provision of communication-platform-as-a-service. The company was formerly known as PT Kresna Graha Sekurindo and changed its name to PT Kresna Graha Investama Tbk in July 2015. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Kresna Graha Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kresna Prima Invest.
